title: psychotria zevallosii
intro: Psychotria zevallosii, also known as the Zevallos' wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical forests of South America, particularly in Ecuador and Peru. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Psychotria zevallosii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, which is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion.
